name: splitting
when_to_use: 把元素文本拆成 word/char/line 的 span 并给每个填 CSS 变量(--char-index/--char-percent/--line-index…),为错峰/逐字/逐行动画做准备时用它,再用 CSS 或 animejs(已在目录)驱动。它本身不产动画——只拆 DOM+写变量,动画归你的 CSS/JS。
why_valuable: 行检测与每项 index/percentage 变量很易错;AI 很难手工产出可用的分行或错峰索引。

data_in.note: 拆分对象的文本从 target.textContent 读;返回按元素分组的结果数组(每项含 .chars/.words/.lines 生成的 span 节点)。chars/words 只需你自写 CSS 用变量;lines/grid/cells 需 splitting.css 布局。

schema.target: string 选择器 | Element | NodeList —— 要拆分的元素
schema.key?: string —— CSS 变量/类前缀,默认无
schema.whitespace?: boolean —— 保留空白节点,默认 false
schema.matching?: string —— grid/cols 模式的子元素匹配选择器

en.when_to_use: Use it to split an element's text into word/char/line spans and fill CSS variables on each (--char-index/--char-percent/--line-index...), preparing staggered, character-by-character, or line-by-line animation driven by CSS or animejs (already in the catalog). It does not animate by itself; it only splits DOM and writes variables, while animation remains in your CSS/JS.
en.why_valuable: Line detection and per-item index/percentage variables are easy to get wrong. AI struggles to hand-produce useful line grouping or stagger indices.

data_in.note: Text is read from target.textContent. The result is an array grouped by element, with each item containing generated span nodes under .chars/.words/.lines. chars/words only require your own CSS using the variables; lines/grid/cells need splitting.css layout.

schema.target: string selector | Element | NodeList -- element(s) to split
schema.key?: string -- CSS variable/class prefix; none by default
schema.whitespace?: boolean -- preserve whitespace nodes; default false
schema.matching?: string -- child-element match selector for grid/cols mode

boot.codex:
import Splitting from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/splitting@1.1.0/+esm';
const results = Splitting({ target: data.target ?? '[data-splitting]', by: data.by ?? 'chars' });

example._why: 钉本库的 target+by 契约;by 值只在 chars/words/lines/grid/cells 里取。

uplink: 纯 DOM-prep,无 uplink;生成的 span 节点数组由消费 AI 直接接下游动画。

carriers.widget: supported:只改目标元素自身子树,传 shadow 节点即可;用 lines/cells 时把 splitting.css 采纳进 shadowRoot
carriers.codex: supported:default export,纯 DOM 变换,无 worker/wasm

isolation.evidence: API correct: +esm default export(er as default)= Splitting({target, by, key, whitespace, matching});by-plugins chars/words/lines/grid/cells 均在;把 target.textContent 拆成带 CSS 变量/类的 span 节点、只作用于目标子树;返回按元素分组的结果数组。globalStyleInjection=no;globalDomMutation=no:只改传入 target 自身子树;grep 到 0 处 document.head、0 处 document.body、0 处 window.*、0 处 addEventListener。splitting.css/splitting-cells.css(assets 200)是 lines/cells 的外链布局规则,非库注入。shadowCompatible=yes。
